name: Feature request
about: Suggest a practical improvement for the lifecycle automation demo
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Workflow Area

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Onboarding
- [ ] Offboarding
- [ ] Group or license mapping
- [ ] SaaS payload generation
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] PowerShell scripts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI or tests

## Use Case

Explain the practical identity lifecycle or automation scenario this supports.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe what should happen when the feature is implemented.

## Safety Notes

Does this change affect simulation mode, mock Microsoft Graph actions, report contents, or production-hardening guidance?

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, or screenshots if helpful.
